title: alyssum montanum subsp. atlanticum
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. atlanticum, also known as a mountain alyssum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its sedative and anxiolytic properties. Alyssum montanum subsp. atlanticum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
